paid_route_probe.reason: The frozen preexisting-liability ledger already includes the settled reader route proof, current no-paid endpoint inventory matches both executable routes, and another paid probe would add duplicate unregistered liability. The first reserved benchmark dispatch remains fail-closed and the campaign stops on any route or settlement failure.

execution_environment.secret_injection: wrap only the benchmark process with doppler run --project syndai --config dev
execution_environment.child_environment: empty base plus HOME, PATH, locale, timezone, OPENROUTER_API_KEY, and OPENAI_API_KEY

stop_predicates: stop on any failed pair or missing proof
stop on any cap, infrastructure, security, write, route, or settlement failure
never rerun a completed billable row
stop after the registered Sonnet decision and do not run Luna or Sol
do not start n100_to_n300 or full_500 from this authorization
claim_boundary: This authorizes only the frozen P1-T6 n=12 development gate. It is not a pass, SOTA claim, default routing decision, larger-run authorization, merge, or push authorization.
